description: On GET /api/tasks failure the page falls back to hardcoded demo tasks and state ready instead of showing the required error state, so the tasks-error UI is unreachable dead code.
On a non-400 POST /api/tasks failure (e.g. 500) the form silently navigates back to /tasks and discards the typed title instead of showing an error and preserving input.

check.pattern: Offline/preview: still return to the list
